data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD): rebar reopen -> ".../rebar: line 291: $1: unbound variable" (exit 1). Siblings claim/archive print proper usage on no args.

Source: src/rebar/_engine/rebar:291 — reopen arm does _ticketlib_dispatch ticket_transition "$1" closed open after set -- ${_OUTPUT_ARGS[@]+...} under set -u, with no arity check.

Fix: guard [ $# -ge 1 ] || { _print_subcommand_help reopen >&2; exit 1; }. RED test: rebar reopen (no args) exits 1 with a Usage line and no bash diagnostics.
data.title: rebar reopen with no args crashes with raw bash 'unbound variable' instead of usage
